role: The main canvas visualization component that renders the universal projection from /api/projection and /api/stream onto an HTML canvas, with interactive controls for multiple lenses and a handoff to the builder.
capabilities: Fetch projection from /api/projection with lens/time/centre/pole/rung/nucleation params
Subscribe to /api/stream SSE for live projection updates
Canvas rendering of points, concentric rings, dyadic grid, sector boundaries and labels
Multiple radius modes: temporal now/day/week, semantic meaning-distance, separator lean, nucleation fit/pile
Radial zoom slider for expanding inner bands
Time scrubber to centre the view in the past
Frame switching between now/day/week cycle coordinates
Lens/binding selector driven by server-provided bindings list
Semantic centre picking and meaning-field re-centre actions
Separator two-pole gravity view with pole A/B selection, balance readout and default-pole reset
Nucleation type-birth view with registry/store/rung pickers and 20/80 birth dial
Connections directed chord diagram with sector picking and in/out edge readout
Scale ladder (unit vs coarse theme rungs) with crossfade animation
Point picking card showing summary, address, strain, scale and pole details
Working-set selection and handoff to builder via builder-context custom event
Strain overlay toggle for structure↔meaning divergence lines
Error view with retry nonce and reset-to-default-lens escape
Responsive ResizeObserver redraw and live NOW breathing animation
substance_why: The file is a ~430-line component implementing distinct geometry, server-driven lens modes, SSE live updates, canvas rendering, animations, and multiple interactive readouts rather than a stub.
interactions_present: Canvas pointer-down picks the nearest point (or sector in connections mode)
Live/freeze button toggles following NOW and returns from past scrub
Time scrub slider moves the centre into the past
Frame buttons switch between now/day/week radius semantics
Lens dropdown selects a server-provided binding
Zoom slider magnifies the inner radial band
Scale rung buttons switch between units and coarse theme centroids
Semantic 'centre on this' and 'meaning-field from here' actions on picked points
Separator 'set pole A/B' and 'default poles' reset actions
Nucleation registry/store/rung dropdowns and 20/80 birth dial slider
Connections sector pick highlights in/out edges; centre click clears
Add/remove point from working set and 'hand to builder' button
Error retry button and reset-to-default-lens button
interactions_missing: No keyboard navigation or shortcuts for lens/time/selection
No touch gestures such as pinch-zoom or pan on the canvas
No hover tooltips or preview before clicking a point
No URL/query-string persistence of lens, centre, poles, rung or time state
No explicit loading skeleton or empty-state when projection has zero points
No canvas context menu, export/snapshot, or full-screen action
No accessibility labels/roles for canvas controls or the custom color legend
No offline or degraded-mode handling beyond the retry button
performance_risks: The large draw() callback runs on every live animation frame and recomputes getComputedStyle, sector/point maps, label sorting and text measurement each frame
Theme-label collision detection is O(n^2) and runs every redraw
Every projection fetch redraws all points and rebuilds animation state regardless of point count
ResizeObserver triggers immediate full redraws without throttling
The draw callback closure is recreated on many state changes, causing frequent effect re-runs
No point-count cap or virtualization; large projections render every item every frame
SSE onmessage debounces to 220ms but still fetches the full projection on each event burst
reuse_verdict_why: The projection-fetch/SSE pattern, lens state machine, canvas geometry, and interaction concepts should be kept, but the monolithic component and frame-heavy rendering loop need to be refactored into smaller, shared pieces.
decomposition_hints: Extract a useProjection hook that owns fetch params, SSE subscription, retry/error state and data normalization
Split the canvas renderer into lens-specific layers (TimeWheel, SemanticCircle, SeparatorBasins, NucleationSquare, ConnectionsChord, ScaleTheme) sharing geometry helpers
Share nucRadius, sepTheta, radial and hit-test math between draw and pick via a geometry module
Move UI overlays (foot controls, picked card, separator/nucleation/connection readouts, working set bar) into separate components
Create an animation/tween hook for position transitions and rung crossfade
Create a working-set store/hook for selection and builder handoff
Extract theme-label layout into a collision-resolver utility or off-main-thread worker for large theme sets
